description_long: This object consists of a set of four matching kitchenware items: two shallow plates and two deep bowls. The exterior surfaces are a dark, matte color, while the interiors are a smooth, glossy white, creating a striking contrast. The bowls are round with gently sloping sides and a slightly thicker base, while the plates are flat with a subtle rim. The set appears to be made of ceramic or porcelain, giving it a refined and modern look suitable for both casual and formal dining. The surfaces are clean and free of visible decoration, chips, or cracks, indicating excellent condition. The overall design is minimalist and functional, ideal for serving food in a contemporary urban setting.
description: A set of two deep bowls and two shallow plates with dark exteriors and glossy white interiors, featuring a minimalist, modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the bowls in the foreground and plates in the background, highlighting the depth and curvature of the bowls.
description_view_1: Angled view with the bowls on the left and plates on the right, emphasizing the contrast between the bowl and plate shapes.
description_view_2: Rear view with the plates in the foreground and bowls in the background, showing the flatness of the plates and the bowl openings.
description_view_3: Side view with one plate and one bowl more prominently visible, illustrating the relative sizes and profiles of each item.
attribute_location: dining table or kitchen in a modern home or restaurant
attribute_context_of_use: serving food such as soups, salads, or main dishes
